programme.desc: Fisheries and Wildlife Officer, Pat Reynolds, turns relationship counselor when he's called to capture three escaped snakes at a farm on the outskirts of Miami.

programme.title: Miami Animal Police
programme.desc: In Homestead, a 12 foot albino burmese python is on the loose eating anything in sight. It's eating the local cats and dogs and its next victim could be a small child.

programme.title: Louisiana Law
programme.desc: A suspect fleeing on the levee after dark puts wildlife agents in danger.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot
programme.desc: The team travels back to the Pacific Northwest to determine the squatchiest state in the US.

programme.title: Off Limits
programme.desc: Don burns rubber and collects grease in North Carolina, scales a water slide in Texas and dives under Denver Union Station.

programme.title: Tanked
programme.desc: NBA superstar Anthony Davis brings Wayde and Brett on board to transform an entire room into an aquarium! Will they be able to deliver a winning tank?

programme.title: Rugged Justice
programme.desc: Officers race to rescue passengers on a capsized boat and arrest a suspect with multiple drug warrants. Plus, a bear carcass is put to good use by a local tribe.

programme.title: Miami Animal Police
programme.desc: In Homestead, a 12 foot albino burmese python is on the loose eating anything in sight. It's eating the local cats and dogs and its next victim could be a small child.

programme.title: Louisiana Law
programme.desc: A suspect fleeing on the levee after dark puts wildlife agents in danger.

programme.title: The Vet Life
programme.desc: The vets are faced with a pug who is struggling to breathe through narrowed nostrils and struggle as they deal with a small dog who seems to have a failing heart.

programme.title: How Do Animals Do That?
programme.sub-title: The Secret To A Long Life
programme.desc: How are homing pigeons able to find their way home? How are spiders luring bugs into their trap? How can some fish survive for years above ground?

programme.title: Dolphin Days
programme.desc: Wild male Atlantic dolphins in the Bahamas are in pursuit of an in-season female while one bottlenose in Florida learns whether or not she is fit for motherhood.

programme.title: Dolphin Days
programme.desc: One of the youngest bottlenose pups at the Dolphin Research Centre is beginning to mature, and two young males with the Wild Dolphin Project get a little rowdy during playtime.

programme.title: Crikey! It's The Irwins
programme.desc: The Irwins take action when a beloved crocodile becomes critically ill. And, Terri welcomes five fluffy koala joeys from Kangaroo Island.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans
programme.desc: It's fall in the Arctic National Wildlife Refuge and that means the caribou are migrating. Plus, a bear ransacks a cabin, creating a food shortage.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans
programme.desc: Surviving 400 miles from civilization boils down to one thing, finding food. Heimo pursues the animal that can feed him and Edna for months, a moose.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans
programme.desc: To prepare for the unforgiving season when temperatures drop to -50, everyone must search for the one animal large enough to feed a family through winter.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans
programme.desc: Winter has finally arrived, and while Bob deals with the ramifications of crashing his plane, Heimo seeks a way to cross a newly frozen river.

programme.title: Alaska Gold Diggers
programme.desc: The team return to Fairbanks after escaping the storms at Gold Run. But with the season soon ending will they find enough gold to afford to return next year?

programme.title: Homicide Hunter
programme.desc: A group of friends discover the corpse of entrepreneur Jamie Foster. When Lt Joe Kenda digs deep, he discovers that Foster's business put him in close quarters with a host of unsavoury characters.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter
programme.desc: When two women are gunned down, Kenda has to determine who was the target. The case takes a turn when he learns a woman was recently murdered under similar circumstances.

programme.title: Liverpool Murders: Ashley & Olivia
programme.desc: Liverpool, 21 August 2022. Ashley Dale and Olivia Pratt-Korbel are fatally gunned down, innocent victims caught in a web of feuding organised crime groups.

programme.title: Making a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Off a road once called Gasoline Alley, a landscape gardener trawled for vulnerable women, killing seven and burying them in his 'garden': a waste area behind a shopping mall.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: Found shot near Highway 67 in 1986, Maria Pilar Del Gadillo Carrillo remained unidentified until 2024, when authorities used genetic genealogy and reopened her case.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: Follow along as detectives in cities across America work tirelessly to generate leads within the first 48 hours of a crime.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter
programme.desc: Officers respond to a shooting and discover the body of police informant Jimmie Stevenson. Jimmy's loose lips made him a target for a list of killers, and it's up to Lt Joe Kenda to find his killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter
programme.desc: When a pregnant mother and her two sons are murdered, pressure mounts for the detectives to catch the monster. Kenda begins to tighten the noose on a prime suspect, but what happens will shock him.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Police officers across the US patrol the streets, targeting car thieves, drug dealers, and violent offenders to stop anyone stepping onto the wrong side of the law.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers intervene in a street fight, a suspect insists police told him to flee, and a troubled young mum gets a second chance.

programme.title: Chloe Ayling: My Unbelievable Kidnapping
programme.desc: Chloe Ayling recounts her 2017 kidnapping, how it changed her life and asks why, eight years later, her story remains so hard to believe.

programme.title: Evidence of a Killer
programme.desc: Murder cases are forensically analysed as detectives and scientists reveal the evidence, breakthroughs and clues that led to each killer's conviction.

programme.title: Murder 24/7
programme.desc: A man is arrested for the murder of Courtney Valentine-Brown, but during his interview, he names another as being the killer.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: When Kim Allen is found murdered in her home, her estranged and abusive husband is the likely suspect. A risky bluff by detectives takes the case in a surprising direction.

programme.title: Chloe Ayling: My Unbelievable Kidnapping
programme.desc: Chloe Ayling recounts her 2017 kidnapping, how it changed her life and asks why, eight years later, her story remains so hard to believe.

programme.title: Bizarre Murders
programme.desc: An intended murder victim turns the tables and kills her would-be hitman.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young doctor in a rural community is accused of sedating and sexually assaulting two of his female patients.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A married couple decide to escape the cold of winter with a mini-vacation in Key West. The wife goes missing, and police search every square inch of the island.

programme.title: Killer in Plain Sight
programme.desc: When Mark Winger shoots and kills an intruder, he is hailed by the public as a tragic hero. The case is quickly closed as a homicide, but there's one piece of evidence that isn't adding up.

programme.title: UK National Anthem
programme.desc: God Save the King' is broadcast each morning at 0559 on GB News - Britain's News Channel.

programme.title: Breakfast with Eamonn and Ellie
programme.desc: Join Eamonn Holmes & Ellie Costello to start your day across the United Kingdom. This is your breakfast show. Join the conversation about what is happening in our nation and the world.

programme.title: Britain's Newsroom
programme.desc: Andrew and Miriam present Monday to Thursday mornings. When the news happens, it happens here. But what does it mean for you? GB News brings you the biggest stories and the answers you need from across the UK.

programme.title: Good Afternoon Britain
programme.desc: Tackling the big stories from all angles and perspectives. Weekdays from midday, Tom Harwood and Emily Carver bring you the most compelling stories from across the United Kingdom.

programme.title: Martin Daubney
programme.desc: Join Martin for an up-to-the-minute take on the day's events delivered in his own unique and lively style.

programme.title: Dewbs & Co
programme.desc: Plain-speaking, straight-talking - Michelle delivers her individual take on the day's news.

programme.desc: Nigel Farage doesn't hold back in his GB News prime-time show. Hear his views and give your own in an action-packed hour of discussion and debate. Join Nigel as he takes on the big stories other media don't want to touch.

programme.title: Indiana Jones: Kingdom of Crystal Skull
programme.desc: Back in a new globe-trotting adventure, the Soviets kidnap Indiana in Mexico as they plot to harness the power of the Crystal Skull of Akator in the Cold War.

programme.title: Bulletproof
programme.desc: Once inseparable pals, two men find themselves on opposite sides of the law, each feeling betrayed by the other. Now, through a strange twist of fate, the pair are on the run - together.

programme.title: Back to the Future
programme.desc: Marty, a typical teen, is accidentally sent back to 1955 in a plutonium-powered time machine. Marty must make sure his teenage parents-to-be meet and fall in love so he can get back to the future.

programme.title: Robin Hood: Prince of Thieves
programme.desc: Robin vows to avenge his father's death when his father is murdered by the Sheriff of Nottingham.

programme.title: The Blues Brothers
programme.desc: The orphanage where Jake and Elwood were raised will be sold unless the tax on the property is paid within days. The brothers decide to raise the money by putting their band back together.

programme.title: A League of Their Own
programme.desc: The story of an All-American Girls' Professional Baseball League formed in 1943 when the men were away at war.

programme.title: Major League
programme.desc: The new owner of the Cleveland Indians puts together a team of misfits so they'll lose and she can move them to Miami. When they uncover the plot, they decide to teach her a lesson and start winning.

programme.title: Bulletproof
programme.desc: Once inseparable pals, two men find themselves on opposite sides of the law, each feeling betrayed by the other. Now, through a strange twist of fate, the pair are on the run - together.

programme.title: Back To The Future
programme.desc: When teenager Marty McFly is blasted to 1955 in the DeLorean time machine created by the eccentric Doc Brown, he finds himself mixed up in a time-shattering chain reaction that could vaporize his future-and leave him trapped in the past.

programme.title: Robin Hood: Prince of Thieves
programme.desc: Kevin Costner is the hero leading a peasant revolt against the evil Sheriff of Nottingham . Stirring adventure with Morgan Freeman. Strong language/violence.

programme.title: The Blues Brothers
programme.desc: The orphanage where Jake and Elwood were raised will be sold unless the tax on the property is paid within days. The brothers decide to raise the money by putting their band back together.

programme.title: A League Of Their Own
programme.desc: During World War II, a group of fiesty women come together and join the All American Pro Girls League in order to fill the shoes of baseball players off fighting the war, and their participation in the games creates lasting friendships.

programme.title: Major League
programme.desc: An exotic dancer inherits a baseball team and deliberately sets out to make them lose as many games as possible so that poor attendance will justify moving the team to Miami, but the players find out about her plan and fight back by play...

programme.title: Gattaca
programme.desc: A man is labelled an 'In-Valid' because he was conceived not in the lab, but in love, in a future where 'designer people', forged in test tubes, rule society.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Framed for the deaths of his espionage team, secret agent Ethan Hunt faces one impossible mission after another if he's to say one step ahead of the lethal assassins on his tail and discover the shocking truth.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop
programme.desc: When freewheeling Detroit detective Axel Foley tracks his friend's killer to sunny Beverly Hills, his street-smart attitude clashes with LA culture.

programme.title: A Few Good Men
programme.desc: A US military lawyer defends two US marines charged with murdering a fellow marine at the Guantanamo Bay Naval Base in Cuba.

programme.title: Uncle Buck
programme.desc: Uncle Buck is the last person you would think of to watch the kids. However, during a family crisis, he is suddenly left in charge of his nephew and nieces.

programme.title: Twelve Monkeys
programme.desc: From a future where a virus has decimated the population and survivors live underground, a man is sent back to the 1990s to uncover the origins of the plague, but the authorities of that era believe that he has merely gone insane.

programme.title: Gattaca
programme.desc: A man is labelled an 'In-Valid' because he was conceived not in the lab, but in love, in a future where 'designer people', forged in test tubes, rule society.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible

programme.title: Trails to Oishii Tokyo
programme.desc: Peas shine at every stage of growth, from shoot and pod to full-grown. Enjoy home cooking, Edo-style sweets, and elegant cuisine built around spring peas.

programme.title: NHK NEWS 7
programme.desc: NEWS7 is NHK's flagship domestic evening news program, bringing you the latest from our Tokyo studio. It's presented with English audio on NHK World for our international viewers

programme.title: Today's Close-Up
programme.desc: As Japan's population ages, pets are often left without care, a burden that passes on to medical and care workers. Partnerships between healthcare and animal welfare professionals are emerging.

programme.title: NEWSROOM TOKYO
programme.desc: NEWSROOM TOKYO dives deeper into the day's news with insight and analysis, from the perspective of Japan and the rest of Asia. We put a spotlight on what you need to know to understand the issues.

programme.title: Direct Talk #247
programme.sub-title: A Device That Improves Children's Vision
programme.desc: Amblyopia is a condition where vision in one eye doesn't properly develop. Ishigaki Yo has created a device that improves vision through gaming. He talks about designing products that benefit society.

programme.title: Trails to Oishii Tokyo 10min.
programme.desc: Peaches take the spotlight. From June to October, new varieties appear every two weeks, letting people enjoy them for months. Big, sweet, and juicy discover the charm of Japan's finest peaches.

programme.title: Ukiyoe EDO-LIFE
programme.desc: In the Edo period, childbirth was a community affair, with the mother-to-be attended by a midwife and the women in her life. It was also characterized by unique customs and superstitions.

programme.title: NEWSROOM TOKYO

programme.title: Core Kyoto
programme.sub-title: The Art World's Genealogy: Respect for creative predecessors
programme.desc: A lineage of modern artists preserves and evolves Nihonga traditions, using the techniques as the foundation of their work. Convention and avant-garde, past and present resonate throughout their art.

programme.title: Trails to Oishii Tokyo 10min.
programme.desc: Introducing asari, Japan's most popular clam. Visit Aichi to feast your eyes on asari dishes and see how they're cultivated using suspended cages. How about diving for some giant asari?!

programme.title: Ukiyoe EDO-LIFE
programme.desc: A group of anglers stand in a fast-moving, undulating river at the foot of a rugged cliff. They use "drifting mosquito hooks" to fish for a summer delicacy that was a favorite of the Edo townspeople.

programme.title: Hometown Stories
programme.desc: With colorful pile fabric and comfortable knits, Wakayama prefecture is drawing global attention as a textile hub. We bring you striking images of its machines and the beat of its factories.

programme.title: Satoyama Kitchen Summer
programme.sub-title: Hot Days and Cool Nights Make Tasty Veggies
programme.desc: At the Satoyama Kitchen guesthouse in Hida Takayama, chef Nobuko, her cameraman husband Makoto and their cat Tama take us on a tasty journey of local cuisine served with a side of seasonal scenery.

programme.title: On the Wings 5min.
programme.desc: Join us on a night flight to admire Japan's stunning views on a journey from Tokyo to Fukuoka. Behold the sublime beauty of Mt. Fuji at sunset and the sparkling night views of major cities.

programme.title: Totally Timeless
programme.desc: The ultimate mix of guitar-driven anthems and singalong favourites. From soaring choruses to easy rock staples, these are the tracks that never go out of style.

programme.title: Thesis
programme.desc: A Spanish film student (Ana Torrent) finds a videotape showing the torture and murder of a missing coed.

programme.title: The Science of Sleep
programme.desc: A man entranced by his dreams and imagination is love-struck with a French woman and feels he can show her his world.

programme.title: Sasquatch Sunset
programme.desc: In the misty forests of North America, a family of Sasquatches find themselves on a collision course with the ever-changing world around them.

programme.title: Vivarium
programme.desc: A young couple looking for the perfect home find themselves trapped in a mysterious labyrinth-like neighbourhood of identical houses.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros.
programme.desc: Two Brooklyn plumbers, Mario and Luigi, must travel to another dimension to rescue a princess from the evil dictator King Koopa and stop him from taking over the world.

programme.title: God is a Bullet
programme.desc: After his ex-wife is murdered and his daughter is kidnapped, Bob Hightower, infiltrates the group to hunt down their leader with the help of the cult's only female victim escapee.

programme.title: Cypher
programme.desc: Paranoia drives this hi-tech cyber thriller when a computer programmer who turns to corporate espionage is caught in a spiral where even his own identity is put in doubt.

programme.title: Reunion
programme.desc: When heavily pregnant Ellie returns to her childhood home to complete a book manuscript, she's reunited with her estranged mother. Consumed by dark memories that haunt the house, she ends up unearthing a hidden, horrifying reality.

programme.title: Psycho Goreman
programme.desc: An intergalactic warlord becomes enslaved to a pair of Earth children after they unwittingly resurrect him.

programme.title: Noroi: The Curse
programme.desc: A paranormal journalist named Kobayashi goes missing shortly after completing a documentary. What begins as an investigation into strange noises soon evolves into the chilling mystery of a demonic entity.

programme.title: Society
programme.desc: A Beverly Hills teen discovers his parents are part of a gruesome orgy cult for the social elite.

programme.title: Joint Security Area
programme.desc: After a shooting incident at the North-South Korean border DMZ leaves two North Korean soldiers dead, a neutral Swiss and Swedish team investigates what actually happened.

programme.title: The Paper Tigers
programme.desc: Three martial artists notorious in their prime as the three tigers" have grown into middle-aged men one kick from a pulled muscle. But after their teachers murder, they must juggle dead-end jobs, dad duties, and old grudges to avenge him.

programme.title: The Hit
programme.desc: Ten years after Willie Parker ratted on his old mobster friends in exchange for personal immunity, two hit men kidnap him and drive him to Paris for his planned execution. However, they encounter many mishaps along the way.

programme.title: Hokuriku Proxy War
programme.desc: A Yakuza group from Osaka with dreams of national dominance moves into the snowy Hokuriku region, sparking a bloody turf war with local gangs.

programme.title: Color Out Of Space
programme.desc: After a meteorite lands in the front yard of their farm, Nathan Gardner and his family find themselves battling a mutant extraterrestrial organism that infects their minds and bodies, transforming their quiet rural life into a technicolo...

programme.title: A Bittersweet Life
programme.desc: Gangster Woo-Sun has worked his way up the ranks, earning the trust of his crime boss Mr. Kang who assigns him to follow his mistress. But Woo-Sun becomes the target when he chooses to spare the mistress and her secret lover.

programme.title: District 13: Ultimatum
programme.desc: Leito and Damien try their best to restore law and order in the ravaged District 13 that has been ruled by the mafia kings. But intelligence officers from the DISS try to interfere in their operation.

programme.title: Pusher 2
programme.desc: Tonny has just been released from prison. He must now take care of the son he has found out he has while trying to win his father, a brutal gangster king, love.

programme.title: Under The Silver Lake
programme.desc: In this stylish neo-noir, a slacker embarks on a surreal quest across LA in search of a seductive vanished woman and the truth behind the mysterious disappearances in his neighborhood.

programme.title: Severance
programme.desc: A bonding weekend goes horribly wrong for seven colleagues who find themselves facing the chop when they are sabotaged by a deadly enemy. Only the smartest will survive this brutal office outing.

programme.title: Oasis
programme.desc: An irresponsible and childish ex-con befriends a girl with cerebral palsy and develops a progressively stronger bond with her.

programme.title: A Tale Of Two Sisters
programme.desc: On returning home from a mental health facility, two sisters find that, along with their stepmother, they have to find a way to deal with their late mother's ghost who begins to haunt them.

programme.title: The Thicket
programme.desc: A hardened bounty hunter is hired to track down a ruthless killer and gathers an unlikely group to help him on a dangerous journey into a deadly wilderness.

programme.title: Police Story
programme.desc: A kung-fu policeman must protect a female witness from a Hong Kong drug lord for whom she used to work. Jackie Chan and Brigitte Lin star.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1990)
programme.desc: From their base in the city sewers, turtle heroes Michelangelo, Raphael, Leonardo and Donatello are on a mission to defeat an evil warlord and wipe out crime.

programme.title: Infernal Affairs
programme.desc: China. Chen Wing Yan, a young police officer, has been sent undercover as a mole in the local mafia. Lau Kin Ming, a young mafia member, infiltrates the police force.

programme.title: Infernal Affairs II
programme.desc: In Hong Kong, Chan Wing Yan goes undercover in the triads as Lau Kin Ming joins the police. Both sides face a common threat from a rival crime boss. (Subtitles)

programme.title: Infernal Affairs III
programme.desc: A rivalry develops between Lau and Yeung, as each tries to uncover the other's secret. Meanwhile, Lau suffers an identity collapse when he loses track of reality.

programme.title: G.I. Samurai
programme.desc: A squadron of Japanese Self-Defence Force soldiers find themselves transported through time to their country's warring states era, when rival samurai clans were battling to become the supreme Shogun.

programme.title: The Wind
programme.desc: An evil presence stalks a woman alone on the American frontier in this acclaimed western-horror.

programme.title: Naked Weapon
programme.desc: Madame M, kidnaps forty pre-teen girls to train them as the most deadly assassins. CIA operative follows the case for 6 years with no leads, but when a series of assassinations begin to occur, he suspects that Madame M is back in business.

programme.title: Sator
programme.desc: Secluded in a desolate forest, a broken family is observed by Sator, a supernatural entity who is attempting to claim them.

programme.title: You Don't Nomi: Verhoeven's Showgirls
programme.desc: A chorus of film critics and fervent devotees explore the complicated afterlife of 1995's biggest film flop, Paul Verhoeven's Showgirls, from disastrous release to cult adoration and extraordinary redemption.

programme.title: Showgirls
programme.desc: A young woman travels to Las Vegas with the desire to be one of the biggest showgirls on the strip, and plans to stop at nothing to get there, but as she climbs to the top, she realizes that her friendships, morals and soul are on the line.

programme.title: Possession
programme.desc: A woman starts exhibiting increasingly disturbing behaviour after asking her husband for a divorce. Suspicions of infidelity soon give way to something much more sinister.

programme.title: Day Of The Dead
programme.desc: As the world is overrun by zombies, a small team of scientists, civilians and military personnel trapped in an underground bunker battle desperately to ensure the survival of the human race.

programme.title: The Crying Game
programme.desc: A young recruit for the IRA is assigned to watch a British soldier kidnapped in a plan to free an Irish rebel, and he ultimately forms a bond with the man and a relationship with his girlfriend, who the recruit promises to protect.

programme.title: District 13
programme.desc: Captain Damien must team up with Leito, a local insurgent from District 13, to defuse a neutron bomb that has fallen into the hands of a local drug lord, Taha, and rescue Leito's sister Lola.

programme.title: Dark Diamond
programme.desc: After his father's death, a man vows vengeance against the relatives who abandoned him.

programme.title: Dobermann
programme.desc: The Dobermann is the slickest gangster in town and the leader of the gang of the same name. They have more bank robberies to their name than they can count. But his adversary, corrupt and ruthless cop Christini, is hell bent to capture him.

programme.title: Jungle
programme.desc: A group of friends trek into the Amazon jungle with a guide who has a mysterious past. Their journey quickly turns into a terrifying ordeal as the deadliest threats of the wilderness lead to an all-out fight for survival.

programme.title: Police Story 2
programme.desc: A dedicated Hong Kong cop's unusual policing methods result in his demotion to traffic duty, despite his success in fighting crime. Meanwhile, an old enemy is released from prison and sets out to get revenge.

programme.title: To Catch A Killer: Part 2
programme.desc: Part 2. After achieving two search warrants, Kozenczak finds a large amount of incriminating evidence, and later 29 bodies buried throughout John Gacy's property.

programme.title: Winnie The Pooh: Blood And Honey 2
programme.desc: Not wanting to live in the shadows any longer, Winnie-the-Pooh, Piglet, Owl and Tigger take their fight to the town of Ashdown, leaving a bloody trail of death and mayhem in their wake.

programme.title: The Stunt Man
programme.desc: A fugitive stumbles onto a movie set just when they need a new stunt man, takes the job as a way to hide out and falls for the leading lady while facing off with his manipulative director.

programme.title: Project Wolf Hunting
programme.desc: During transport, a group of hardened criminals stages a jailbreak that quickly escalates into a bloody, all-out riot. As the fugitives exact their brutal terror campaign onboard the ship, something even more terrifying emerges from below.

programme.title: The Collection
programme.desc: After being celebrated for escaping from "The Collector," an infamous serial killer who makes it impossible for anyone to get away alive, a man is forced to get into a booby-trapped warehouse to save an innocent woman from the murderer.

programme.title: Caligula: The Ultimate Cut
programme.desc: Excess, violence and corruption mark the notorious emperor's reign in first-century Rome.

programme.title: The House That Jack Built
programme.desc: We follow the highly intelligent Jack through 5 incidents and are introduced to the murders that define Jacks development as a serial killer. We experience the story from Jacks point of view. He views each murder as an artwork in itself.

programme.title: The Chaser
programme.desc: A former police officer turned pimp begins searching for missing women who worked for him. He discovers they all visited the same client before disappearing, leading him into a dark and violent hunt.

programme.title: Border Security: America's Front Line
programme.desc: JFK Airport officials look for drugs in backpacks; a driver in Washington arrives in someone else's vehicle; a Detroit citizen takes a wrong turn.

programme.title: Border Security: Australia's Front Line
programme.desc: A US couple's medicinal marijuana claim is busted when officers find a stash. A woman's bags are full of fish. An Indian package hides narcotics in handbags.

programme.title: Police Ten 7
programme.desc: In New Zealand, the term 'Police Ten 7' means 'Police have arrived on the scene'. This unique fly-on-the-wall reality series brims with action as it follows urban cops on the beat.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: An officer pulls over an intoxicated driver whose passenger can't get enough of him. Police deal with two aggro men who have been caught street racing, and get a laugh from a man on a souped-up cycle.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Police officers across the US patrol the streets, targeting car thieves, drug dealers, and violent offenders to stop anyone stepping onto the wrong side of the law.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A quiet cyclist surprises deputies with his actions. A family man regrets letting COVID-19 fears lead him astray. Officers investigate a car swerving dangerously on the road.

programme.title: Cops Reloaded
programme.desc: A suspect of a shooting is seen walking to a corner store. Officers witness a driver buying drugs. A bad liar is arrested on drug charges. An intoxicated woman is arrested for domestic violence.

programme.title: Cops Reloaded
programme.desc: A male suspect involved in a domestic dispute is taken down. An officer arrests an armed suspect facing jail time. A man is spotted dealing drugs and a chase ensues. Officers conduct a sting operation.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Police Interceptors returns with full access to West Yorkshire's elite teams as they tackle crime, drugs and dangerous drivers using high-tech cars, dogs, drones and more.

programme.title: Motorway Cops
programme.desc: With three million dashcams now in vehicles, a look at some of Britain's worst driving offenders.

programme.title: Code 1: Extreme
programme.desc: The crew respond to a girl found unconscious at school. Barry Watkin & Karl Taylor find one of their own in serious trouble.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Police officers across the US patrol the streets, targeting car thieves, drug dealers, and violent offenders to stop anyone stepping onto the wrong side of the law.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: Australia's east coast face devastating bushfires and drought. Smoke from fires impact lifeguards visibility, air quality, and ability to protect beach goers.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: A former New York family court judge, Judge Judy acts as a true moral compass for people seeking guidance, resolution and a little common sense.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire and Jamie call upon Jamie's grandsire, Lord Lovat, in an attempt to elicit support for the Jacobite cause.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire and Jamie reunite with the Lallybroch and MacKenzie men during training. Meanwhile, an Englishman arrives in camp with new information.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Trusting in Claire's knowledge of 'history', Jamie leads the Jacobite army into a critical battle with British opposition near the town of Preston.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire and the Highlanders are sent north after the Jacobite leaders decide to halt their march on London. A band of redcoats makes trouble for the Scots, leading to a most unexpected reunion for Claire.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: As Jamie puts all of his efforts into turning the Jacobite army away from the impending slaughter at Culloden Moor, Claire attempts to comfort the sick Alex Randall.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Flashing forward to 1968, Claire reveals the truth about her parentage to her daughter. Back in the 18th century, the day of the Battle of Culloden has arrived.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: After living through the Battle of Culloden, Jamie is at the mercy of British victors, until his past provides his only hope of survival. Meanwhile, Claire attempts to adjust to life in 1940s Boston.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie leads a lonely life until Lallybroch is threatened by redcoats pursing the elusive Jacobite traitor. In Boston, Claire and Frank struggle to co-exist in a marriage haunted by the ghost of Jamie.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: In prison, Jamie discovers that an old foe has become the warden and has the power to make his life hell. Claire and Frank both put their best foot forward in marriage.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: While serving as a groomsman at Helwater, Jamie is pulled into the intrigue of a British family. In 1968, Claire, Brianna and Roger struggle to trace Jamie's whereabouts.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Brianna grapples with life-changing revelations and Claire must help her come to terms with the fact that she is her father's daughter. Roger brings news that forces Claire and Brianna to face a choice.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Trusting in Claire's knowledge of 'history', Jamie leads the Jacobite army into a critical battle with British opposition near the town of Preston.

programme.title: Outlander

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: While Jamie races to steer the Jacobites away from Culloden, Claire tends to an ailing Alex Randall and faces a weighty request from Colum MacKenzie.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Flashing forward to 1968, Claire visits the past and reveals to her daughter the truth about her parentage. In the 18th century, the day of the Battle of Culloden has arrived, and Jamie must do everything he can to save the ones he loves.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Trusting in Claire's knowledge of history, Jamie leads the Jacobite army into a critical battle with British opposition near the town of Preston. Meanwhile, Claire attends to the dead and dying, a reminder of the truest costs of war.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: After living through the Battle of Culloden, Jamie finds himself at the mercy of unforgiving British victors. Meanwhile, a pregnant Claire attempts to adjust to life in the modern world of 1940s Boston - and reconnect with Frank.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: In prison, Jamie discovers that an old foe has become the warden - and now has the power to make his life a living hell.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: As Jamie finds a surprising ally at Ardsmuir Prison, Claire's medical school graduation accelerates her crisis with Frank.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: While serving as groomsman at the aristocratic estate of Helwater, Jamie is reluctantly pulled into the intrigue of a noble British family. In 1968 Scotland, Claire, Brianna and Roger struggle to trace Jamie's whereabouts in history.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: As Brianna grapples with the life-changing revelations of the past summer, Claire must help her come to terms with the fact that she is truly her father's daughter - her 18th century Highlander father.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: After decades apart, Jamie and Claire finally reunite and rekindle their emotional and physical bonds. But Jamie's new business dealings jeopardize the couple's hopes for a simple life together.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: In the aftermath of a violent confrontation, Claire follows her conscience as a surgeon, even though it could put her and Jamie's lives at risk. Jamie attempts to evade the reach of the Crown as its representative closes in on his illega...

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire returns to Lallybroch with Jamie, where she does not receive quite the reception she was expecting. Unbeknownst to her, Jamie's made some choices in their time apart which come back to haunt them with a vengeance.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire and Jamie leave Scotland, sailing to the West Indies on an urgent quest. But when the superstitious crew looks for someone to blame after a string of bad luck, rescue comes from an unlikely source.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire races to discover the source of an epidemic aboard a disease-stricken ship before hundreds of sailors die. And as Jamie locks horns with Captain Raines, Fergus finds himself torn between loyalty and love.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: After making a leap of faith, Claire washes up on a seemingly deserted island where survival is her only option.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: The Artemis finally reaches Jamaica bringing Jamie and Claire that much closer to their goal. During a lavish ball on the island, the Frasers encounter old allies, as well as former adversaries who threaten to derail their mission.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire is forced to play a game of cat and mouse with an old adversary as she searches for Young Ian. The Frasers race through the jungles of Jamaica to prevent the unthinkable.

programme.desc: Jamie's Aunt Jocasta welcomes the weary travelers to her lavish plantation, where Claire's views on slavery soon stir up trouble.
